name: Heroic Challenger - War Hammer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｈ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒロイック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チャレンジャー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ウォー・ハンマー
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can equip the destroyed monster to this card. (You can only equip 1 monster at a time to this card with this effect.) This card gains ATK equal to that equipped monster's ATK.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can equip the destroyed monster to this card. (You can only equip 1 monster at a time to this card with this effect.) This card gains ATK equal to that equipped monster's ATK.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can equip the destroyed monster to this card. (You can only equip 1 monster at a time to this card with this effect.) This card gains ATK equal to that equipped monster's ATK.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
